hero.body: We build secure VPN infrastructure, market-ready web apps, and mobile products. Fast. Beautiful. Built to last.

services.label: What We Build
services.body: We cover the full stack. Pixel-perfect interfaces to secure cloud infrastructure.
services.web_desc: Scalable React and TypeScript web platforms, from SaaS dashboards to marketing sites.
services.mobile_desc: Cross-platform iOS and Android apps built with Expo and React Native.
services.vpn_desc: WireGuard-based VPN infrastructure, zero-log architecture, and privacy-first systems.
services.backend_desc: Node.js REST APIs, PostgreSQL databases, and scalable cloud deployments.
services.design_desc: User-centered design systems, interactive prototypes, and brand identity.
services.devops_desc: Docker, Oracle Cloud, automated CI/CD, and 99.9% uptime infrastructure.

whyus.label: Why perfectPS
whyus.body: We have built software products across industries, from fintech to security infrastructure. Here is what we bring to every engagement.
whyus.card1_desc: We run tight sprints with clear milestones. You always know what is being built, when it ships, and what comes next. No surprises.
whyus.card2_desc: Every product we build starts with threat modeling. From zero-log VPN infrastructure to encrypted APIs, security is architecture, not an afterthought.
whyus.card3_desc: We are not a factory. We invest in understanding your business and act as a technical co-founder, not just an agency on a contract.

process.label: How We Work
process.body: A proven 4-step process that keeps every project on track, on budget, and on time.
process.step1_desc: We start by understanding your business goals, users, and constraints. No jumping straight to code. A clear brief saves weeks of rework.
process.step2_desc: Architecture decisions, UI systems, and prototypes. We align on the plan before writing a single production line, so you can see it before we build it.
process.step3_desc: Iterative development in tight sprints. Regular check-ins, live previews, and test coverage at every stage. No black-box development.
process.step4_desc: Production deploy, monitoring setup, and post-launch support. We do not hand you a zip file. We ship it, measure it, and stay on until it is stable.

work.label: Selected Work
work.page_body: A curated sample of products built across industries. All client identities are kept confidential under NDA.
work.portfolio_desc: A curated sample of products built across industries. Client identities are kept confidential under NDA.

techstack.label: Technology
techstack.body: Modern stack, battle-tested choices. Built for performance and long-term maintainability.

about.label: About the Studio
about.quote: We believe in clean code, beautiful interfaces, and infrastructure that actually works.
about.p1: perfectPS is a digital studio based in the Middle East. We specialize in secure, high-performance digital products.
about.p2: We built PS Secure, a zero-log VPN platform trusted by users across the region. We partner with businesses to design, build, and ship products that make an impact.
about.p3: We believe in clean code, beautiful interfaces, and infrastructure that actually works.

products.label: Our Products
products.name: PS Secure
products.subtitle: VPN and Privacy Platform
products.desc: Enterprise-grade VPN powered by WireGuard. PS Secure delivers zero-log privacy, AdGuard DNS filtering, a hardware kill switch, and native iOS and Android apps. All under perfectPS infrastructure.

pssecure.hero_body: Enterprise-grade WireGuard VPN. Zero logs. Lightning fast. Available on iOS and Android.
pssecure.f1_desc: The fastest and most modern VPN protocol. Significantly faster than OpenVPN or IPSec.
pssecure.f2_desc: We never store, sell, or share your data. No traffic logs, no connection logs, ever.
pssecure.f3_desc: Built-in ad and tracker blocking at the DNS level. Browse cleaner and faster.
pssecure.f4_desc: Automatically disconnects internet if the VPN drops. Your real IP is never exposed.
pssecure.f5_desc: iOS, Android, and desktop support from one account. All devices, one subscription.
pssecure.f6_desc: Optimized servers across the Middle East and beyond for low-latency connections.
pssecure.step1_desc: Available on iOS and Android. Free to download, instant setup.
pssecure.step2_desc: No configuration, no complexity. Tap once to connect to the best server.
pssecure.step3_desc: Full privacy, full speed. Your data is encrypted, your identity is protected.
pssecure.cta_body: Join the waitlist and be the first to get access.

capabilities.label: Scale & Expertise
capabilities.body: Across web, mobile, and infrastructure. We do not list them all — we let the scale speak for itself.

footer.tagline: Building digital products that are fast, secure, and built to last.

contact.label: Let's Work Together
contact.body: Tell us about your idea and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.success_body: We will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.info_note: We typically respond within a few hours during business days.
